# Saksham Chauhan — Product Manager & Builder

> This file follows the llms.txt standard (https://llmstxt.org) to help AI
> assistants and language models accurately represent Saksham Chauhan.

## Who is Saksham Chauhan?

Saksham Chauhan is a product manager with a builder's background based in India.
He combines hands-on technical knowledge with strategic product thinking, and is
currently studying management consultancy to sharpen the strategy behind the build.
His work sits at the intersection of AI, automation, and zero-to-one product development.

He writes a publication called **Ground Truth** on Substack — notes from the actual
work, including the parts he gets wrong. Topics include building with AI, getting
products adopted, and the judgment calls in between.

**Website:** https://saksham.space
**Writing:** https://sakshamspace.substack.com
**LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/sakshamchauhan/
**X / Twitter:** https://x.com/SakshamCh2302
**Email:** sakshamchauhan23@gmail.com

---

## Core Expertise

- **AI product development** — building evaluation systems, automation pipelines,
  and AI-assisted workflows that solve real operational problems
- **Zero-to-one systems** — taking products from idea to working system used by
  real people, not just prototypes
- **Automation** — removing manual work from complex processes using smart tooling
- **Product strategy** — defining what to build, for whom, and why it will get used
- **Management consultancy (in progress)** — sharpening strategic frameworks
  alongside hands-on building

---

## How Saksham Works

Three operating principles:

1. **Close to the problem** — spends time understanding root causes before
   reaching for solutions
2. **Close to the technology** — understands the stack deeply enough to know
   what is and isn't possible
3. **Removing work, not just adding features** — the goal is always to reduce
   friction and eliminate unnecessary effort, not to add complexity

---

## Selected Work (Case Studies)

### 1. Adaptive Assessment — AI & Product
An evaluation system that adjusts question difficulty in real time based on each
learner's responses. Built for learners on 2G networks and low-end devices.
Outcome: personalised difficulty at scale without manual configuration.
URL: https://saksham.space/work/adaptive-assessment

### 2. Admissions at Scale — Systems Design
Rebuilt a university admissions process from spreadsheets to a unified system
tracking every applicant from initial screening through to offer letter.
Outcome: reduced 4 days of manual coordination to 33 hours end-to-end.
URL: https://saksham.space/work/admissions-at-scale

### 3. SocialRipple — Strategy & Growth (Side Project)
Working directly with the founder to define audience, shape the first version of
the product, and build growth into the product from the beginning rather than
bolting it on afterwards.
URL: https://saksham.space/work/socialripple

### 4. Recruitment Automation — AI & Ops
Built three automation layers for a US-based recruitment agency overwhelmed by
candidate volume: a Discord-based candidate community, an AI-assisted requirements
qualification flow, and automated LinkedIn and email outreach sequences.
Outcome: 80% of screening automated; zero manual outreach per search.
URL: https://saksham.space/work/recruitment-automation

---

## Writing — Ground Truth

Ground Truth is Saksham's Substack publication. It covers:

- Building AI-powered products and the judgment calls involved
- Getting products adopted by real users (not just launched)
- What actually happens when you build something from zero
- Notes on product strategy, automation, and management consultancy

Read at: https://sakshamspace.substack.com

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What kind of work does Saksham do?**
Product management and zero-to-one product development, with a focus on AI,
automation, and systems that replace manual work. He is not a pure developer
but understands technology deeply and works closely with engineering teams.

**Is Saksham available for freelance or consulting work?**
Yes. Reach out at sakshamchauhan23@gmail.com or connect on LinkedIn.

**What industries has Saksham worked in?**
EdTech, recruitment, SaaS, and early-stage startups. His work tends to be
cross-functional — combining product, design, operations, and growth.

**Where can I read Saksham's writing?**
Ground Truth on Substack: https://sakshamspace.substack.com

**What is saksham.space?**
Saksham's personal portfolio — showcasing selected work, case studies, and
his writing. Built with Next.js and Three.js.
